name: GKE Kubernetes Dashboard Disabled
description: The Kubernetes Dashboard should be disabled on GKE clusters as it can be a security risk and is deprecated in favor of Cloud Console
remediation: Disable the Kubernetes Dashboard addon on the GKE cluster using gcloud container clusters update
remediation_steps: Use gcloud: gcloud container clusters update CLUSTER_NAME --update-addons KubernetesDashboard=DISABLED
Use Google Cloud Console: Navigate to the cluster, click Edit, and disable the dashboard addon
Use kubectl to access the cluster through Cloud Shell or gcloud instead
